title: Up Entity
text: Up Entity An Up entity is an inner entity that represents the one side in a one-to-many relationship with the outer entity. Deleting the outer entity is subject to delete constraints. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: ent Main Development Object? No Part of: Component Entity ( Outer Entity ) Contains: Component Entity , Component Field , Label , Property , Code Container Generalization: Component Entity , Inner Entity , One Entity Specializations: — Compilation Output: — Specialization Up Entity specializes Inner Entity in that it references a One Entity.
